title: AI on Kubernetes? EKS Auto Mode Handles the Burst
summary: EKS Auto Mode is an AWS service that optimizes Kubernetes cluster management for AI workloads by reducing GPU instance idle time and spin-up delays. The service handles automatic resource provisioning to minimize latency when serving inference requests on expensive GPU instances.
